witnesses.description: Three distinct rational sample points for the basis 1, x, x^2.
Exact coefficient-to-sample replay on the same finite grid.
A small alternating residual table with equal absolute values.

checks.claim: The listed finite grid is unisolvent for quadratic polynomials.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the evaluation matrix and exact determinant.

checks.claim: The listed quadratic coefficients produce the listed finite sample values.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes the matrix-vector product from coefficients to sample values.

checks.claim: The listed residual alternates signs with equal absolute value on the finite grid.
checks.notes: The validator recomputes residual values, signs, and common absolute error.

checks.claim: The duplicate-node grid is unisolvent for quadratic polynomials.
checks.notes: Exact replay rejects the grid because the determinant is zero and x - x^2 vanishes on all listed sample points. The separate qf-lra-bad-duplicate-node-grid row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed duplicate-node determinant claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression constructs the source QF_LRA conflict, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes determinant = 0 together with determinant = 1 using rechecked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: The listed quadratic interpolation polynomial has value 5 at x = 1.
checks.notes: Exact replay recomputes p(1)=4 for p(x)=2 - x + 3*x^2. The separate qf-lra-bad-interpolation-sample row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed finite Chebyshev interpolation sample claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes the final sample-value equality conflict using rechecked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: The listed alternating residual table has uniform error 2/3.
checks.notes: Exact replay recomputes residual values 1/2,-1/2,1/2 and common magnitude 1/2. The separate qf-lra-bad-alternating-residual row owns the proof-object refutation.

checks.claim: The fixed malformed finite Chebyshev alternation uniform-error claim is linearly inconsistent.

data.certificate: The resource regression parses the source SMT-LIB artifact, emits UnsatFarkas evidence, and independently checks the certificate.

checks.notes: The Axeyum regression refutes the final uniform-error equality conflict using rechecked Farkas evidence.

checks.claim: General Chebyshev-system and minimax-approximation theorems require future Lean resources.

data.target_theorem_shape: Haar spaces, Chebyshev systems, minimax approximation, alternation theorems, compactness arguments, and infinite-dimensional functional analysis
data.future_checker: Lean module with no sorryAx dependencies

checks.notes: The finite rows are checked; general Chebyshev-system theory remains a proof-assistant horizon.
